scripts:
set properties on /content/dam/mvnreponse/jcr:content
  set cq:conf{String} to /conf/mvnreponse
  set jcr:title{String} to "MVN Reponse"
end

set ACL on /conf/mvnreponse
  allow jcr:read for everyone
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write,jcr:versionManagement,jcr:lockManagement,jcr:modifyAccessControl,crx:replicate for template-authors
  allow crx:replicate for content-authors
end

set ACL on /conf/mvnreponse/settings/wcm/templates
  allow jcr:read for everyone
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write,jcr:versionManagement,jcr:lockManagement,jcr:modifyAccessControl,crx:replicate for template-authors
  allow crx:replicate for content-authors
end

set ACL on /conf/mvnreponse/settings/wcm/policies
  allow jcr:read for everyone
  allow jcr:read,jcr:write,jcr:versionManagement,jcr:lockManagement,jcr:modifyAccessControl,crx:replicate for template-authors
  allow crx:replicate for content-authors
end
